# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - external.api.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-db.company.com
  - postgres.external.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-db.company.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: external-db.company.com
        port:
          number: 5432
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth.api.com
  - payment.api.com
  - notification.api.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth.api.com
  - payment.api.com
  - notification.api.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: auth.api.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
